query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `messages` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `conversationId` int NOT NULL, `senderId` int NOT NULL, `content` text NOT NULL, `moderated` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `moderationFlag` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `moderationReason` text, `llmSuggestion` text, `readAt` timestamp, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `messages_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
